cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Namaste! This is Rohan from DCB Bank, sir. How are you today?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, I'm fine, thank you. What's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Ma'am Kulwinder Kaur Virk, we have a reminder for your personal loan EMI. It's due in three days, on the 15th of this month. The amount is Rs. 25,000.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 21s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A polite agent from a legitimate bank ([BANK_NAME]) calls a customer as a reminder that their personal loan EMI is due in three days. They mention the amount and due date and suggest paying via the official bank app.
